title: crepis willdenowii
intro: Crepis willdenowii, also known as Willdenow's hawk's-beard or creeping hawk's-beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Crepis willdenowii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as a natural remedy for skin conditions. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
